_note: Tracked safe template only. Do not commit live pool credentials, payout addresses, worker tokens, or Stratum V2 token URLs here. For production, copy config/mining_pools_live.json to a local secret-managed file and set HYBA_POOL_CONFIG_PATH.

viabtc.name: ViaBTC BTC
viabtc.description: ViaBTC SHA256 pool. Configure credentials in local secret-managed runtime config.

braiins.name: Braiins Pool
braiins.description: Braiins Stratum V1 job-flow profile. Do not commit inline token URLs or pool tokens.

ckpool.name: Solo CKPool
ckpool.description: CKPool solo mining. Configure BTC address in local secret-managed runtime config.

nicehash.name: NiceHash SHA256
nicehash.description: NiceHash SHA256. Configure pool id and worker in local secret-managed runtime config.

stratumv2.description: Disabled until full Stratum V2 channel/job/share flow is implemented end-to-end.
